summary: The diff implements a comprehensive visitor statistics tracking system with backend data structures, tracking functions, cleanup mechanisms, statistics calculations, frontend tracking middleware, charts, and auto-refresh capabilities. All 12 requirements appear to be addressed with evidence in the codebase.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) with complex migration logic from OldActor to NewActor including fields like dailyStatsMap, onlineUsersSet, and sessionStorage that were not requested
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 only requested creation of visits and visitor_sessions data structures. The migration module includes additional data structures (dailyStatsMap, onlineUsersSet, sessionStorage) and migration logic that were not part of the requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer component displays visitor statistics with auto-refresh every 15 seconds
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-9 specified that VisitorStatsPage should display statistics, not the Footer component. Displaying statistics in the public Footer was not requested.
